author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for splitting src/config/keybindings.rs (22KB single file housing schema + parser + resolver) into src/keybindings/{parser,resolver,actions}.rs with src/config/keybindings.rs reduced to a <2KB schema-only module. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires moving every import site in the codebase that pulls KeyAction/KeybindingResolver/ChordResolveResult/parse_chord, plus deciding the new module's pub surface. Pure restructuring (no behavior change), but touches every TUI dispatch site. Low priority and cosmetic — the file is large but internally cohesive. Owner-level when timing permits.
